purpose: Record prototype usability-study readiness, participant availability, and local substitute evidence for the v0.6.0 task-first UI without telemetry or personal speech data.

participantAvailability.blocker: No consented prototype-study participant notes, recordings, or task observations were provided to this Linux agent session. The agent cannot synthesize human participant evidence.
participantAvailability.releaseImpact: Prototype usability evidence is not complete. Keep the release usability gate open until consented participant sessions or an explicit release decision are recorded.

prototypeTasks.task: Find where to dictate, install or recognize the required speech model state, and identify the first recording action.
Find Vocabulary, create or open a set, and understand enabled versus disabled state.
Start a new voice model, understand the language/recording-plan questions, and reach the first enrollment prompt.
Open a model, interpret whether it is ready to train or blocked, and identify the next action.
Find Import and Export, understand encrypted export and local validation/privacy boundaries, and identify incompatible-model recovery.
Find Storage/Privacy deletion paths and explain what will be removed or retained before confirming.

localSubstituteEvidence.limitation: Semantic content/accessibility gates do not replace participant comprehension evidence.
Viewport/state screenshots do not replace observed task success or confidence.
Local accessibility checks do not replace prototype usability sessions.

openFollowUps.description: Run consented low-fidelity route/copy prototype sessions with the required participant mix or record an explicit release decision accepting the missing evidence.
Release usability study must not claim prototype participant evidence exists unless this artifact is updated with consented observations.

releaseDecision.rationale: Issue #254 acceptance explicitly permits recording the participant-availability blocker when participants are unavailable.
releaseDecision.requiredBeforeRelease: Consolidate prototype blocker with issue #255 release usability evidence and make an explicit release decision before tagging v0.6.0.
